articles.title: Hong Kong Considers Adding Bitcoin to Financial Reserves
articles.description: Hong Kong legislator Johnny Ng said he would explore the feasibility of adding Bitcoin to the city’s financial reserves. His interest follows former US President Donald Trump’s announcement at the Bitcoin 2024 conference in Nashville that he would establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve in the US. Hong Kong’s Potential Bitcoin Reserve Ng, while acknowledging Trump’s speech, noted...

articles.title: RF Kennedy Jr. says Bitcoin is vital to dollar stability, calls for a 4 million BTC reserve
articles.description: Independent presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy announced that his administration would use Bitcoin to stabilize the U.S. dollar. RF Kennedy Jr. intends to achieve this objective by establishing a strategic reserve backed by Bitcoin.

articles.title: Trump’s Speech in Nashville: Gensler Out, Bitcoin Reserve In
articles.description: Donald Trump, speaking at the Bitcoin 2024 conference in Nashville, pledged to remove SEC Chair Gary Gensler if elected in November.
